original_prompt: 给这套产品做一张淘宝详情页，一个欧洲模特穿戴着这套首饰，在米色渐变背景里摆出专业的姿势（手扶着皇冠）。穿着白色连衣裙。
optimized_prompt:
[Visual Description]
"A high-end commercial fashion portrait designed for a Taobao product detail page. The subject is a stunning European model wearing a sophisticated white evening dress. She strikes a professional pose, her hand elegantly raised to gently touch the [Subject Lock: silver-toned baroque tiara with pear-cut crystals] on her head. She is also wearing the matching [statement necklace with V-shape drop] and [diamond-shaped drop earrings]. The lighting is soft, glamorous studio lighting, specifically highlighting the 'metallic luster' and 'pavé setting texture' of the clear rhinestones and cubic zirconia. The background is a smooth, high-quality beige gradient to ensure a clean, luxury aesthetic."

[Text & UI Layout]
"***Layout Style**: Clean Magazine Aesthetic (极简杂志风).
Text Rendering Instructions:
1. **Mood Title**: Content: “为爱加冕”. Style: [Elegant Serif, Gold or Dark Grey]. Position: [Upper left or right negative space].
2. **Description**: Content: “奢华巴洛克 · 梦幻婚礼首选”. Style: [Fine Sans-serif, small, tracking spaced out].
"
layout_logic: Suggest using a vertical composition. The model should fill about 60-70% of the frame, slightly off-center to allow negative space on the beige gradient for the text. The lighting on the hand touching the crown is crucial to draw the eye to the key product (the tiara) first, then cascading down to the necklace.
